title: RAG from Scratch — Building Production Retrieval Systems with LangChain
description: A complete deep dive into RAG architecture — from the fundamentals of indexing, retrieval, and generation through advanced query translation (multi-query, RAG Fusion, step-back, HyDE), logical and semantic routing, metadata-filter construction, multi-representation indexing, RAPTOR hierarchical indexing, ColBERT token-level embeddings, LangGraph state machines for active RAG, adaptive RAG with self-reflection, and the enduring case for retrieval in the era of million-token context windows.
